summary: Implemented full send pipeline: useImageSend.ts orchestrates processImage→encryptMedia×2→blossomClient.put×2→setBlob×2→buildRumor(kind:9)→sendApplicationRumor with progress callbacks. ChatMessage extended with optional attachments and localMediaRefs. ChatStoreContext gains sendImageMessage(file,caption) with optimistic UI (tempId pattern, updates to final after send). ImageAttachmentButton renders paperclip icon + hidden file input with capture='environment'. GroupChat gains ImageAttachmentButton in composer, preview thumbnail with remove button, drag/drop+paste handlers, image-too-large-error, image-send-failed, image-retry-button error states. 7 unit tests cover pipeline order, progress sequence, failure path, setBlob before rumor, kind:9 rumor, imeta tag roles.
